since_last: 69% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.67%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 69% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.46% · BTC -3.21% · Gold +1.13% · Nasdaq100 +1.11%. 69% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.67%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.67%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.08%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.08%, AMBA +6.44%, VRT +6.09%, TER +5.87%, S +5.60%. Laggards: DDOG -2.35%, RXRX -2.24%, WDAY -2.09%, AVAV -2.03%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.52% at $166.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.52% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
